name: api-negocia
description: Monorepo: API de negociação com IA (backend + frontend)

scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run build && pm2 restart ecosystem.config.cjs
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && npm run lint:fix && cd ../frontend && npm run lint:fix
scripts.format: cd backend && npm run format && cd ../frontend && npm run format
scripts.format:check: cd backend && npm run format:check && cd ../frontend && npm run format:check
